Privacy Policy

BetterQuizzes helps people take interactive quizzes generated through ChatGPT. This page explains the data the app handles and the limits of the current hosted service.

What the app handles

  • Quiz content, including questions, answer choices, and answer keys provided by ChatGPT.
  • Your quiz responses, confidence ratings, draft progress, and submission status.
  • Grade writeback data when ChatGPT records a score or feedback for a submitted quiz.
  • Basic technical data needed to load the widget, recover drafts, and display results.

How data is used

Data is used to render the quiz, save progress, submit answers back to ChatGPT for grading, and show grade feedback in the widget. BetterQuizzes does not sell personal data and does not use third-party analytics or advertising trackers.

Storage

Drafts, quiz packets, submissions, and grade feedback may be stored temporarily in the browser and in server memory so the widget can recover from refreshes and show results. This storage is not a durable account or gradebook. Hosted server memory may reset during redeploys, restarts, or service maintenance.

Student and classroom use

BetterQuizzes is intended for practice and tutoring workflows. Do not ask users to enter unnecessary sensitive personal information. Teachers, parents, and guardians should review generated quizzes before assigning them and should not rely on BetterQuizzes as a permanent student-record system.

Third parties

BetterQuizzes is designed for use inside ChatGPT. Submitted quiz answers are returned to ChatGPT so it can grade or explain the result. Your use of ChatGPT is also governed by OpenAI's terms and privacy policy.

Contact

For privacy questions, contact support@betterquizzes.example. This placeholder must be replaced with the real support address before public app submission.
